title: telemetry — health probes
description: Combined probes across the three signals. Each probe is scoped to the signal it exercises; the aggregator groups them under one telemetry module surface.

probes.name: telemetry-otel-sdk-initialized
probes.description: TracerProvider + MeterProvider bound. keepsuit's IsRecording() returns true.

probes.name: telemetry-otel-registry-hydrated
probes.description: SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry compiled from #[AsSpan] / #[AsCounter] / etc discovery.

probes.name: telemetry-otel-exporter-reachable
probes.description: OTLP endpoint reachable (TCP + first-byte). Non-critical because we drop-on-backpressure — unreachable exporter doesn't fail requests.

probes.name: telemetry-otel-dropped-spans-ratio
probes.description: Ratio of dropped spans over last 5 minutes. Warns at 5%, fails at 25%.

probes.name: telemetry-otel-batch-processor-buffer
probes.description: In-process BatchSpanProcessor queue depth. Alerts when > 80% of maxQueueSize.

probes.name: telemetry-logs-pipeline-initialized
probes.description: ProcessorPipeline + ChannelResolver bound. Redactor rules loaded.

probes.name: telemetry-logs-sink-reachable
probes.description: Active sink (Loki / DataDog / file / stdout) is writeable. Non-critical because failures just buffer.

probes.name: telemetry-logs-dropped-records-ratio
probes.description: Ratio of dropped records over last 5 minutes. Warns at 1%, fails at 10%.

probes.name: telemetry-logs-redaction-enabled
probes.description: PRODUCTION-critical. Verifies telemetry.logs_redaction_enforcement kill switch is on. Off = PII leak risk.
